metadata.creator: Dageron
metadata.description:
This is a texture editor made by Dageron which is able to open and replace textures in texture dictionaries of RAGE (Rockstar Advanced Game Engine) based games on consoles (PS3 and Xbox360).
It should work with Grand Theft Auto V, Grand Theft Auto IV, Red Dead Redemption, Midnight Club Los Angeles and Max Payne 3.
metadata.subject: RAGE Texture Editor
metadata.title: RAGE Console Texture Editor 1.3.1 & 1.5
metadata.subject: RDR Texture Editor
GTA V Texture Editor
GTA V Console Texture Editor
RAGE Console Texture Editor
